name: Snyk
description: Snyk is a developer security platform that finds and fixes vulnerabilities in code, open-source dependencies, containers, and infrastructure as code. Use this API to monitor projects, test packages for vulnerabilities, manage organizations, and track security issues.

capabilities.name: orgs_list
capabilities.description: List all organizations the authenticated user belongs to.

capabilities.name: orgs_get
capabilities.description: Get details of a specific organization.

capabilities.name: projects_list
capabilities.description: List all monitored projects in an organization.

capabilities.name: projects_get
capabilities.description: Get details of a specific project by ID.

capabilities.name: projects_update
capabilities.description: Update a project's settings and attributes.

capabilities.name: issues_list_by_org
capabilities.description: List all vulnerability issues across an organization.

capabilities.name: issues_get
capabilities.description: Get detailed information about a specific issue.

capabilities.name: issues_list_by_package
capabilities.description: List known vulnerabilities for a specific package version.

capabilities.name: targets_list
capabilities.description: List all import targets in an organization.

capabilities.name: targets_get
capabilities.description: Get details of a specific target.

capabilities.name: targets_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a target and optionally its projects.

capabilities.name: sbom_get
capabilities.description: Get SBOM (Software Bill of Materials) document for a project.

capabilities.name: audit_logs_search
capabilities.description: Search organization audit logs for security and compliance events.

capabilities.name: import_project
capabilities.description: Import a repository or target for continuous vulnerability monitoring (v1 API).

capabilities.name: test_dep_graph
capabilities.description: Test a dependency graph for known vulnerabilities without importing (v1 API).

capabilities.name: user_me
capabilities.description: Get details of the currently authenticated user.
